seo.list_description: Find pickleball open play sessions near you and join fellow players

list.empty_upcoming: No upcoming sessions yet, be the first to host one!

errors.startInPast: Start time must be in the future
errors.endNotSameDay: End time must be on the same day as the start time
errors.endBeforeStart: End time must be after the start time
errors.locationRequired: Please select a court or enter a full address
errors.createFailedRetry: Failed to create session, please try again later

card.saved_hint: View all saved sessions in your member center

line.desc: PikFun will remind you via LINE 1 day and 2 hours before the session
line.desc_returning_suffix: It's not too late to set it up now.
line.email_note: Email reminder scheduled ({{email}}) · Tap to enable LINE notifications
line.channel_missing: LINE Channel ID is not configured, please contact the admin
line.enabled: LINE reminders enabled, you'll be notified before the session

login_prompt.title: Not registered or logged in yet?
login_prompt.desc1: You need to be a PikFun member to join a session.
login_prompt.desc2: Register now to join fellow players with one click.

info.ended_note: This session has started or ended

panel.title: Session Overview
panel.lead: Confirm the time and location, then click the button above to join
panel.step_login: Log in to your PikFun account
panel.step_pay: Complete payment per the session notes (if any)

detail.confirm_cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this session?

create.title: Host a Session | PikFun

brand.title: Host a Session
brand.subtitle: {{greeting}}, {{name}}. Fill in the details below to find players.

fields.title_placeholder: Session title (e.g., Weekend Doubles at Da'an Park)
fields.description_placeholder: Additional notes: skill level, equipment, reminders…
fields.time_hint_mobile: End time must be on the same day as the start time
fields.time_hint_desktop: End time must be on the same day as, and after, the start time
fields.skill_hint: Choose a pickleball rating (e.g., 3.5), or enter a custom value below

court_search.manual_hint: Manually entered addresses may not display on the map; selecting from the court list is recommended
court_search.no_courts: No court data for this area
court_search.geo_denied: Couldn't get your location, please allow location access
court_search.geo_unsupported: This device doesn't support location services

errors.location_required: Please select a court or enter a full address
errors.create_failed_retry: Failed to create session, please try again later

create.note: By publishing a session, you agree to PikFun's session guidelines and confirm the information provided is accurate.

panel.title: Once published, players can sign up
panel.lead: Complete the form above and publish — your session will appear in the PikFun sessions list
panel.fee_editable_note: You can still edit this on the session page after publishing
panel.step1: Fill in court, time, and player count
panel.step2: Publish and share with fellow players
panel.step3: Players sign up, everyone shows up to play
panel.tip1: Selecting from the court list gives more accurate map location
panel.tip2: A suggested skill level helps players decide if it's a good fit
panel.tip3: You can manage sign-ups from the session page after publishing

hero.marquee_text: Open Play · Pickleball · Find your court · Join the Game · Host a Session ·

almost_full.description: Browse pickleball sessions that are almost full, check the time, location, and remaining spots. When spots are running low, join in one click and meet fellow players so every session comes together smoothly.

session1.title: Weekend Doubles Meetup — Shipai Sports Center | All levels welcome

session2.title: Weekday Evening Session — Da'an Sports Center | Intermediate+

session3.title: Weekend Morning Session — Banqiao Stadium | Casual play

session4.title: Evening Session — Neihu Pickleball Courts | 1 spot left

demo.placeholder_title: Weekend Pickleball Session — All levels welcome

modal.title: Session Map
modal.subtitle: Click a marker to view sessions · Press Esc or the button to close

map.no_markers: No sessions on the map yet

empty_hint.unmapped_note: There are {{count}} sessions, but their locations couldn't be mapped to a court (possibly a manually entered address). Selecting from the court list when hosting will show it on the map.
empty_hint.no_upcoming: There are no "upcoming" sessions right now (they may all have expired).
empty_hint.no_upcoming_suffix: to view past sessions, or click "Host a Session" to create a new one.
empty_hint.no_sessions: No sessions to display yet. Be the first to host one!

court.not_found: No courts found, you can enter the address manually
court.name_placeholder: e.g., Da'an Sports Center Pickleball Court
court.address_placeholder: e.g., No. 55, Sec. 3, Xinhai Rd., Da'an Dist., Taipei City
court.address_hint: Once you enter a full address, the detail page will automatically show a Google Map
court.map_match_desc: Pick one and we'll record the exact court location, so your activity shows up on the Taiwan Court Map.
court.map_matched: Matched to a mapped court — this activity will appear on the Taiwan Court Map

host_profile.seo_description: View pickleball sessions, events, and the organizer profile for {{name}}.
host_profile.fallback_excerpt: Get on court, meet new players, and enjoy every pickleball session.
host_profile.create_profile_error: Organizer profile has not been created
host_profile.owner_banner: This is your organizer profile. Click "Edit" at the top right of each section to update it.
host_profile.bio_placeholder: No introduction yet. Click "Edit" to write one.
host_profile.mid_cta_desc: Check out the latest sessions hosted by {{name}} and sign up after logging in.
host_profile.contact_empty: No contact info yet. Click "Edit" to add it.

courts_map.seo_description: Explore pickleball courts across Taiwan on the PikFun court map. Tap a pin to view court details.
courts_map.title: Taiwan Pickleball Court Map
courts_map.desc: Pickleball venues across Taiwan, sourced from Google Maps listings and updated continuously. Tap a blue pin to view court details.
courts_map.empty: No courts recorded in this city yet — search for a court when hosting a session to help us add it!
courts_map.map_error: Map failed to load. Please try again later.
courts_map.shared_note: Some venues are multi-purpose or shared with other sports (e.g. basketball or badminton courts). Please confirm actual pickleball hours, nets and court availability directly with the venue. Map info is sourced from Google Maps and is for reference only.

people.title: Meet the Community
people.courts_coming_desc: We're inviting court owners across Taiwan to join PikFun. Stay tuned.
